channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Thursday, April 30, 2026
item.description: Three threads deserve your attention today, Midya. First, the Musk v. Altman trial is surfacing foundational documents about OpenAI's origins — the distillation revelations and internal evidence have real implications for how AI companies will be regulated and how you position AI...
